## Summary

- What changed?
- Why?

## Validation

- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run build`
- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] `bun run test:coverage`

## Release Impact

- [ ] Requires changelog update
- [ ] Requires docs update
- [ ] Requires version bump (`package.json` and `src/cli.ts`)

## Security

- [ ] No secrets/tokens/credentials added
- [ ] Config examples use placeholders only
